mapper.sql: id, user_id, username, task_id, task_name, assign_status, completion_status, accepted_time, completed_time, completion_result, remark, deleted, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT ut.*, t.description, t.priority, t.current_stage, t.deadline, t.initiator_name FROM t_user_task ut LEFT JOIN t_task t ON ut.task_id = t.id WHERE ut.user_id = #{userId} AND ut.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ut.created_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_user_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_user_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
